name: AGI Outlet Monitoring Pipeline
description: Real-time tracking of AGI coverage across 100+ outlets. Dedupes stories, counts sources, tracks amplification.

nodes.name: Load Outlet List
nodes.notes: Reads 100+ outlet definitions with RSS/API endpoints

nodes.name: Poll RSS Feeds
nodes.notes: Parallel requests to RSS endpoints. Parse feed, extract articles.

nodes.name: Poll APIs
nodes.notes: API calls for outlets with direct endpoints (e.g., Medium, Substack)

nodes.name: Web Scraping (fallback)
nodes.notes: For outlets requiring web scraping (lower tier, niche)

nodes.name: Merge & Clean Articles
nodes.notes: Combine results from RSS, API, and scraping. Normalize fields.

nodes.name: Deduplicate Stories
nodes.notes: Eliminate duplicate coverage. Count unique sources per story.

nodes.name: Save Raw Coverage
nodes.notes: Archive raw data by date for historical tracking

nodes.name: Track Story to Social
nodes.notes: Search Twitter for mentions of story URL. Extract amplifiers.

nodes.name: Extract Amplifiers
nodes.notes: Calculate weighted reach for each amplifier

nodes.name: Load Accuracy Scores
nodes.notes: Fetch historical accuracy scores for key voices

nodes.name: Build Dashboard Update
nodes.notes: Format story data for dashboard consumption

nodes.name: Update Dashboard Data
nodes.notes: Write latest stories to file. Dashboard reads this.

nodes.name: Notify Sarah
nodes.notes: Daily or on major stories only (configurable)

next_steps: Implement each node with actual API calls
Test with 10 outlets, then scale to 100+
